scenes.text: High in the sky lived a little cloud named Pip. He was the smallest cloud of all.
scenes.dominant_action: A tiny white cloud drifts alone, the smallest in a vast blue sky.

scenes.text: Every day, the big clouds made rain for the fields below. Boom! Their thunder was loud and proud.
scenes.dominant_action: Big dark clouds boom with thunder and pour rain on the fields far below.

scenes.text: Pip wanted to make rain too. But when he tried, only one tiny drop fell. Plip!
scenes.dominant_action: Pip strains to make rain but only one tiny drop falls out.

scenes.text: "You are too small," rumbled the big clouds. Pip felt smaller than ever.
scenes.dominant_action: The big clouds scold Pip, who shrinks and feels smaller than ever.

scenes.text: So Pip drifted away, down low over a quiet green meadow.
scenes.dominant_action: Pip drifts low and alone over a calm green meadow.

scenes.text: There, on the dry yellow grass, was one little flower. Its petals were drooping and sad.
scenes.dominant_action: A single drooping flower wilts on dry yellow grass.

scenes.text: Pip looked at his one tiny drop. Maybe one drop was not so small after all.
scenes.dominant_action: Pip studies his one tiny drop and reconsiders its worth.

scenes.text: He floated close and let his little drop fall. Plip! It landed right on the thirsty flower.
scenes.dominant_action: Pip floats close and lets his single drop fall onto the thirsty flower.

scenes.text: The flower lifted its head and opened bright and pink. "Thank you, little cloud!" it sang.
scenes.dominant_action: The flower lifts its head, blooms bright pink, and thanks Pip.

scenes.text: Pip smiled the biggest smile a little cloud can smile. He was just the right size to help.
scenes.dominant_action: Pip beams the biggest smile a little cloud can smile, just the right size to help.
